chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Those Who Drown or Are Buried Under a Collapsed House When it is Unclear Who Died First

text: 5657 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ مَهْزِيَارَ عَنْ فَضَالَةَ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنِ اَلْفَضْلِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اَلْمَلِكِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اِمْرَأَةٍ وَ زَوْجِهَا سَقَطَ عَلَيْهِمَا بَيْتٌ قَالَ "تُوَرَّثُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ مِنَ اَلرَّجُلِ ثُمَّ يُوَرَّثُ اَلرَّجُلُ مِنَ اَلْمَرْأَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5657 - Ali ibn Mahziyar narrated from Fadalah, from Aban, from Al-Fadl ibn Abdul Malik, from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a woman and her husband upon whom a house collapsed.
Imam (as) said: "The woman inherits from the man, and then the man inherits from the woman."
